trades.reasoning: Bullish RSI zone, MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, and price above SMA-20 on a mildly positive NASDAQ day support a measured deployment of idle cash into a top-scored, well-established name.

decisions.briefing: Markets were mildly positive today (NASDAQ +1.1%, S&P 500 +0.4%), not a strong risk-on signal but enough to justify deploying some of the $777 idle cash rather than sitting fully out. Added a medium-conviction position in NVDA, which shows full bullish technical confirmation (RSI, MACD, price vs SMA-20). Existing 6 positions held unchanged, letting stop-loss/profit-target rules manage them automatically.

market_education.summary_en: The NASDAQ rose 1.1% and the S&P 500 gained 0.4% in a broadly neutral-to-mildly-positive session, with no single dominant catalyst driving the move. Trading activity reflected steady, moderate risk appetite rather than a sharp risk-on or risk-off shift. No specific news headlines were available for today's session to cite directly.
market_education.summary_zh: 納指今日上升1.1%，標普500則上升0.4%，市況整體屬於中性偏正面，並無單一主導因素推動大市。今日交易反映的是穩定溫和的風險偏好，而非明顯的風險偏好轉變。今日並未有可供引用的具體新聞標題。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that are already trending upward, based on signals like RSI, MACD, and price relative to moving averages, on the idea that stocks moving up tend to keep moving up in the near term. Today's buy decision relied on exactly these signals lining up together, which is considered a stronger, more reliable confirmation than any single indicator alone.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動量投資是指買入已經呈現上升趨勢的股票，依據RSI、MACD及股價相對移動平均線等訊號，認為短期內上升中的股票會傾向持續上升。今日的買入決定正是依賴這幾項訊號同時出現，比單一指標更能提供可靠的確認。
